name: Sprout Social
highlight_text: What it best automates - social publishing and customer responses.
description:
What Sprout Social Does

Sprout Social is a social media management platform designed to automate your clients’ social media activities and provide real-time insights. This automation tool offers all-in-one solutions for social publishing, customer responses, and analytics. 

Sprout Social uses AI and machine learning to serve you in many ways. For instance, the AI-powered publishing workflow helps you schedule posts at the ideal time. Sprout Social also uses machine learning to direct your queries to the most suitable customer care agent. 

Sprout Social also automates repetitive social tasks and generates data-driven insights to improve your post performance.

Key Features 

  • The ability to automatically create, schedule, and publish social media posts to multiple networks from one place. 
  • With AI assistance, it can direct messages to the right agents and resolve your customization needs. 
  • Monitor trends and conversations across multiple social media platforms. 
  • AI bots for schedulingsocial content and responding to messages. 

Benefits of Sprout Social 

  • Sprout Social makes it easy to manage multiple client accounts on one system. 
  • With AI bots that assign your queries to the right agent, you can resolve issues faster and more efficiently. 
  • Sprout Social automates repetitive tasks to save time. 
  • Integrates with other platforms for a well-rounded toolset for social media management. 

Pricing

  • Bills $199 per seat per month. 

Pros

  • All-in-one platform for social media management, publishing, and engagement. 
  • 24/7 customer support is available. 
  • Integrates with major marketing platforms for a unified experience. 

Cons

  • Has higher licensing costs when compared to similar solutions.
